test_cases.description: KnownPeersCache constructor creates empty cache with given maxSize
KnownPeersCache constructor defaults maxSize to 50 when not provided or invalid
add() inserts a new peer entry with lastSeen ~ Date.now()
add() updates lastSeen when URL already exists
assertions: cache.get(url).lastSeen is updated to new Date.now()

test_cases.description: add() evicts oldest entry when cache is at maxSize and new URL is added
add() throws on empty or non-string url
assertions: throws error for empty string url

test_cases.description: add() handles null lastLatency in metadata
get() returns PeerEntry for existing URL
assertions: returned entry has url, lastSeen, lastLatency fields

test_cases.description: get() returns undefined for non-existent URL
get() does not modify cache state (read-only)
getAll() returns shallow copy array of all entries
assertions: returned array is a new array
each element has url, lastSeen, lastLatency

test_cases.description: getAll() returns empty array when cache is empty
remove() removes existing peer entry
remove() is no-op for non-existent URL
size() returns current number of entries
size() is always >= 0 and <= maxSize
getBootstrapNodes converts https origin to wss URL
assertions: returned array has at least 1 element

test_cases.description: getBootstrapNodes converts http origin to ws URL
getBootstrapNodes throws when origin is undefined and window.location unavailable
createPeerExchangeRequest creates valid request object
createPeerExchangeResponse creates valid response object
createPeerExchangeResponse works with empty peerUrls array
handlePeerExchangeRequest returns up to 5 peers excluding requester
assertions: returned array does not contain requesterUrl

test_cases.description: handlePeerExchangeRequest filters out the requester URL
handlePeerExchangeRequest returns at most 5 URLs even with more connected
handlePeerExchangeRequest returns empty array when no connected peers
handlePeerExchangeRequest throws on null/undefined message
handlePeerExchangeRequest throws when connectedPeerUrls is not an array
handlePeerExchangeResponse adds all peer URLs to cache
assertions: each URL in message.peers is in cache

test_cases.description: handlePeerExchangeResponse throws on invalid message
handlePeerExchangeResponse throws on invalid cache
handlePeerExchangeResponse does not exceed cache maxSize after adding peers
selectPeerForRotation returns URL with lowest connectedAt
assertions: returned URL is the one with lowest connectedAt

test_cases.description: selectPeerForRotation returns the only peer when list has one element
assertions: returned URL equals the single peer URL

test_cases.description: selectPeerForRotation throws/returns null on empty list
selectPeerForConnection returns a cached URL not in connectedUrls
selectPeerForConnection returns null when all cached peers are connected
selectPeerForConnection returns null when cache is empty
selectPeerForConnection throws on null cache
isProtocolMessage returns isProtocol:true for valid peer_exchange_request JSON string
isProtocolMessage returns isProtocol:true for valid peer_exchange_response JSON string
isProtocolMessage returns isProtocol:false for non-string data
isProtocolMessage returns isProtocol:false for invalid JSON string
isProtocolMessage returns isProtocol:false for valid JSON without peer_exchange_ type
isProtocolMessage never throws regardless of input
assertions: does not throw for any input

test_cases.description: initializeDiscovery returns a cleanup function and starts timers
initializeDiscovery cleanup function clears both intervals
initializeDiscovery cleanup function is safe to call multiple times
initializeDiscovery throws on null/undefined networkApi
initializeDiscovery throws when networkApi is missing required methods
MIN_PEERS constant is always 3
KNOWN_PEERS_MAX constant is always 50
ROTATION_INTERVAL constant is always 300000
DISCOVERY_INTERVAL constant is always 30000
LRU eviction always removes the entry with the lowest lastSeen value
assertions: after eviction the entry with lowest lastSeen is gone
